Title: Requires a payroll services business to compile and provide annual wage and tax statements and/or year-end forms to clients
Summary: Requires a payroll services business to compile and provide annual wage and tax statements and/or year-end forms to clients without additional cost or delay.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to requiring a payroll services business to compile and provide annual wage and tax statements and/or year-end forms to clients
